ques: Locate a repository on GitHub related to 'quantum computing' that has been updated within the last week and has at least 50 stars. Provide a brief description of the project.
answer: NVIDIA/cudaqx (106 stars, last commit ~6 minutes ago) — "Accelerated libraries for quantum-classical computing built on CUDA-Q." It provides libraries that build on NVIDIA CUDA-Q to enable rapid development of hybrid quantum-classical applications (e.g., quantum error correction decoders and solvers) leveraging CPUs, GPUs, and QPUs.
